segments.text: Neo connects the up air tipper twice and maintains the advantage!
segments.original_text: さあ空中上先端をうまく2回当てて展開継続はネオが握っています

segments.text: The range on this aerial is absolutely incredible!
segments.original_text: 空中でこれは素晴らしいカバー範囲が非常に広い

full_text: Neo connects the up air tipper twice and maintains the advantage! The range on this aerial is absolutely incredible!
